Failure_Mode: Calibration drift (reads high or low of true value)
Effect: Watering decisions based on incorrect moisture level — chronic under- or over-watering; no visible alert
Cause: Sensor ageing; substrate salinity; temperature coefficient; no field calibration performed
Current_Controls: Dual sensor cross-comparison (v5.0 firmware) — divergence >10% flagged immediately; moisture_diverged flag sent to server
Recommended_Action: Per-zone wet/dry calibration at commissioning; periodic recalibration prompts; cross-zone ML anomaly detection
Nerves_Pi_Impact: None — improvement comes from dual sensor hardware; not Nerves Pi

Failure_Mode: Stuck at constant reading (wet or dry)
Effect: Stuck-wet causes chronic overwatering; stuck-dry may trigger critical_dry alert and excessive watering attempts
Cause: Waterlogged sensor; cracked electrode; wiring fault; sensor face fouled
Current_Controls: Dual sensor cross-comparison (v5.0 firmware) — stuck sensor immediately disagrees with live sensor; stuck_moisture software check also active
Recommended_Action: Alert if reading unchanged for >6h while valve not open; rolling min/max window per zone
Nerves_Pi_Impact: None — improvement comes from dual sensor hardware

Effect: VPD calculated incorrectly — watering decisions distorted for all zones on the ESP32; no alert fires
Cause: Sensor ageing; contamination; no plausibility check; no reference comparison
Current_Controls: Dual DHT22 cross-comparison (v5.0 firmware) — divergence >2°C or >5% RH flagged immediately; dht_diverged flag sent to server
Recommended_Action: Bounds check (temp -5 to 50°C RH 0–100%); periodic physical calibration; cross-site ML comparison
Nerves_Pi_Impact: None — improvement comes from dual sensor hardware

Failure_Mode: Incorrect readings (FOV too wide / emissivity mismatch)
Effect: Leaf temp inaccurate — plant stress not detected; if used in future watering logic it will cause errors
Cause: Wide FOV captures background; emissivity not set for vegetation; wrong variant (non-BAA)
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Validate leaf temp vs air temp during commissioning; narrow FOV baffle; confirm BAA variant used

Effect: Intermittent power or signal faults on any connected component; difficult to diagnose remotely
Cause: Outdoor environment; humidity; no weatherproofing on bare connectors; no annual inspection
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Weatherproof connectors; silicone sealant; conformal coat PCBs; annual inspection

Failure_Mode: Mechanical failure open (stuck open regardless of relay/power state)
Effect: Zone continuously waters — root rot; water waste; not caught by NC fail-safe (power-on mechanical failure)
Cause: Debris in valve seat; diaphragm failure; physical damage
Current_Controls: NC selection handles power-loss case only; mechanical stuck-open bypasses all controls
Recommended_Action: Inline manual shutoff per zone; flow sensor (future); periodic physical inspection

Failure_Mode: Slow internal leak through closed valve
Effect: Gradual overwatering undetected — no alert; accumulates over days or weeks
Cause: Worn diaphragm/seat; particulates; valve age
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Trend alert if moisture rises without watering event (ML layer)
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Minor (Pi ML layer could detect moisture rise trend more reliably)

Component: Power supply (12V DC adapter or battery)
Effect: Total site loss — ESP32 offline; all zones offline; valves fail-safe closed (NC); zone offline alert fires after 30 min
Cause: Wall adapter failure; battery depletion; blown fuse; mains outage
Current_Controls: NC solenoids fail safe; zone offline alert fires after 30 min
Recommended_Action: Voltage monitoring on ESP32 ADC; UPS/battery backup

Component: Power supply (12V DC adapter or battery)
Effect: ESP32 resets or behaves erratically; relays may not actuate; sensors read incorrectly
Cause: Ageing adapter; high load; long cable run; battery nearing end of discharge
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Monitor 3.3V rail on ESP32; alert on frequent reboots

Effect: ESP32 loses MQTT connection; switches to local fallback mode; zone offline alert after 30 min
Cause: Firmware bug; overheating; power fluctuation
Current_Controls: ESP32 local fallback; MQTT reconnect; zone offline alert after 30 min
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls; consider auto-restart on router
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant (Pi is WAN gateway; ESP32-to-Pi link is local and shorter range)

Effect: Zone goes offline; local fallback continues watering; no remote visibility; offline alert after 30 min
Cause: Router failure; channel congestion; firmware WiFi stack bug; distance
Current_Controls: ESP32 reconnect loop; local fallback; zone offline alert after 30 min
Recommended_Action: No additional action required; consider watchdog ping to detect persistent failure
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant (Pi is WAN gateway — local ESP32-to-Pi link eliminates long-range WiFi dependency)

Effect: ESP32 loses power; all zones offline; valves fail-safe closed; zone offline alert fires
Cause: Overload; thermal failure; input voltage loss; component failure
Current_Controls: NC solenoids fail safe; zone offline alert fires after 30 min
Recommended_Action: Voltage monitoring on ESP32 ADC to detect pre-failure under-voltage; inline fuse on input

Effect: Permanent loss of remote connectivity to site; zone offline alert fires; local fallback continues
Cause: No usage monitoring; prepaid SIM cap reached; account lapse
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Data usage monitoring; auto-renew SIM; alert approaching cap
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant (Pi buffers locally during outage — data preserved when link restored)

Effect: Lux data inaccurate; currently not used in watering decisions so operational impact is low
Cause: Dust/bird droppings on lens; physical shadowing; no maintenance schedule
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Low priority; clean sensor during routine maintenance visits

Effect: Valve stutters open/closed; water hammer in lines; inconsistent watering; difficult to diagnose
Cause: Insufficient GPIO drive current for 5V coil; marginal 3.3V signal level; power rail noise
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Use optoisolated relay module; add BJT driver between ESP32 GPIO and relay IN if needed

Effect: Zone drops to no_moisture mode; local fallback uses VPD-only watering; sensor_ok alert fires
Cause: Physical damage; waterlogging; cable break; connector failure
Current_Controls: sensor_ok flag; no_moisture mode; alert fires
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Effect: Permanent site connectivity loss; local fallback continues; zone stays offline until physical replacement
Cause: Component failure; lightning; physical damage; end of life
Current_Controls: Zone offline alert; physical replacement required
Recommended_Action: Spare router kept on site or at office; consider dual-SIM router for redundancy
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant (Pi buffers data locally — no data loss when link restored)

Effect: Zone never waters; plants dry out; dripper_fault detection alerts
Cause: Debris jamming diaphragm; broken actuator; coil fault; stuck diaphragm
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detection
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls; inspect on fault alert

Effect: Connectivity drops; local fallback continues; zone offline alert after 30 min
Cause: Tower outage; atmospheric conditions; site location; antenna failure
Current_Controls: ESP32 local fallback
Recommended_Action: External antenna upgrade; site survey before install
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant (Pi is WAN gateway; local ESP32-to-Pi link unaffected by 4G loss)

Effect: All zones on that ESP32 go offline; local fallback stops; valves fail-safe closed
Cause: Lightning; ESD; physical damage; manufacturing defect; power surge
Current_Controls: Zone offline alert fires
Recommended_Action: Spare ESP32 per site; TVS protection on power input

Effect: Zone never waters; plants dry out; dripper_fault detection catches failure
Cause: Inductive spike without flyback diode; high current; contact degradation
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detection
Recommended_Action: Flyback diode across solenoid coil to suppress inductive spike; reduces weld risk

Effect: Valve cannot open; zone never waters; dripper_fault detection catches failure
Cause: Coil overheating; overvoltage; manufacturing defect; excessive switching
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detection
Recommended_Action: Flyback diode across solenoid coil; optoisolated relay module preferred

Effect: Valve fails open or closed; may permanently damage valve; limited by safety timeouts
Cause: Software bug bypassing timeout; watchdog failure; stuck relay keeping valve energised >60s
Current_Controls: ESP32 60s safety timeout; ZoneServer 120s watchdog
Recommended_Action: No additional action required; timeouts provide adequate protection

Effect: ESP32 fails to boot; zone permanently offline until physical reflash or replacement
Cause: Power loss during OTA flash; bad flash block; ESD
Current_Controls: OTA bootloader rollback restores previous firmware automatically
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing OTA rollback

Effect: Zone continuously waters; root rot; water waste; ZoneServer detects stuck valve at 120s and sends stop
Cause: High inductive load without flyback diode; contact degradation; overcurrent
Current_Controls: ZoneServer 120s stuck-valve detection; stop command sent; alert fires; NC solenoid safe on power loss
Recommended_Action: Flyback diode across solenoid coil to reduce arc energy at contact opening

Effect: Loss of sensor data or valve control on affected zone; sensor_ok or dripper_fault detection catches result
Cause: Mechanical damage; UV degradation; vermin; cable strain at connectors
Current_Controls: sensor_ok (sensor cables); dripper_fault (valve cables)
Recommended_Action: Cable conduit or armoured cable in exposed runs; strain relief at all connectors

Effect: Local log data lost silently; data gaps in zone history not visible until queried
Cause: Card wear-out; power glitch during write; filesystem corruption
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Periodic write-verify; log SD errors over MQTT to server
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Minor (Pi takes over local storage role — on-ESP32 SD less critical)

Effect: All zones on ESP32 drop to no_vpd mode; VPD-based watering suspended; sensor_ok alert fires
Cause: Physical damage; wiring fault; power loss to sensor
Current_Controls: sensor_ok flag; no_vpd mode; alert fires
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Effect: One zone may open or fail to open; AO3401 protects VCC rail; sensor_ok or dripper_fault detects result
Cause: ESD; overvoltage on GPIO; soldering defect
Current_Controls: AO3401 protects VCC rail; sensor_ok or dripper_fault detects consequence
Recommended_Action: TVS diodes on GPIO lines for field-deployed units

Effect: Brief interruption; WDT auto-resets within seconds; NC solenoids close safe; data gap visible in history
Cause: Memory leak; stack overflow; sensor library hang; MQTT callback exception
Current_Controls: Internal WDT auto-resets; NC solenoids fail-safe closed; data gap visible in history
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Component: AO3401 MOSFET (sensor VCC reverse polarity protection)
Effect: Sensor loses VCC supply; sensor hard-fails; detected by sensor_ok flag and alert fires
Cause: Overcurrent; ESD; soldering defect; physical damage to SOT-23 package
Current_Controls: sensor_ok flag catches hard sensor failure downstream
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Failure_Mode: I2C bus lockup (one device pulls SDA low — both shared sensors affected)
Effect: Both BH1750 and MLX90614 fail simultaneously; sensor_ok catches both; ESP32 I2C timeout recovery runs
Cause: Failing device holding SDA low; capacitance on long cable run; moisture ingress into connector
Current_Controls: sensor_ok catches both failures simultaneously; ESP32 I2C timeout recovery
Recommended_Action: I2C bus isolator (PCA9517) or per-device power cycling via AO3401; pull-up resistor values reviewed for cable length

Effect: Local data logging stops; server DB remains primary; startup presence check logged to serial
Cause: Physical ejection; card wear-out; power cycle during write; poor contact
Current_Controls: Startup presence check logged to serial
Recommended_Action: No additional action required — Nerves Pi makes on-ESP32 SD less critical
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Minor (Pi takes over local storage role)

Effect: Lux data unavailable; lux not used in watering decisions; sensor_ok flag raised
Cause: Physical damage; I2C address conflict; power loss; wiring fault
Current_Controls: sensor_ok flag
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Effect: Leaf temp unavailable; sensor_ok flag raised; alert fires
Cause: Physical damage; I2C address conflict; power loss; wiring fault
Current_Controls: sensor_ok flag
Recommended_Action: No additional action required beyond existing controls

Component: AO3401 MOSFET (sensor VCC reverse polarity protection)
Effect: Sensor VCC permanently on — intended normal state; no operational impact
Cause: Manufacturing defect; overvoltage transient on gate
Current_Controls: Gate is tied to GND by design; short to GND on gate is the normal biasing condition
Recommended_Action: No action required — failure mode results in normal operating state

Effect: Over-voltage on 5V rail damages ESP32; relay module; sensors; potentially all hardware on the ESP32
Cause: Adjustable module pot drifts; component failure; incorrect initial setting
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: TVS diode on 5V rail; use fixed-output (non-adjustable) 5V modules; verify output with multimeter during commissioning

Effect: Effect
Cause: Cause
Current_Controls: Current_Controls
Recommended_Action: Recommended_Action

Failure_Mode: Wide supply voltage variation (confirmed 205–275VAC at site)
Effect: Consumer-grade adapters rated 220–240V operate outside spec at 275V — PSU failure; over-voltage on 12V output; downstream hardware damage. At 205V output may sag and cause instability. Standard 90–264VAC wide-input PSUs are marginal at 275V.
Cause: Known site condition — measured 205–275VAC variation during the day; likely long LV feeder or poor local grid regulation
Current_Controls: None — no voltage monitoring; standard consumer adapters specified
Recommended_Action: Mandatory — use industrial wide-input PSU rated 85–305VAC (e.g. Meanwell HDR-15-12 DIN rail); add Type 2 SPD (surge protection device) on mains input before PSU; verify PSU output voltage under both 205V and 275V input conditions; do NOT use consumer wall adapters at this site

Failure_Mode: Hard water — high calcium/mineral content causing scale and blockage
Effect: Calcium carbonate scale builds up in drip emitters; solenoid valve seats; moisture sensor faces; pipework. Emitters block progressively — dripper_fault fires repeatedly. Valve seats scale closed — valve fails to open. Sensor face coated — moisture readings drift low.
Cause: Confirmed site condition — hard water supply with high calcium and mineral content
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detects no moisture rise after watering (catches emitter blockage and valve failure downstream); moisture sensor bounds check catches severe drift
Recommended_Action: Mandatory for this site — inline sediment filter + descaler or softener on supply before irrigation system; use emitters rated for hard water (pressure-compensating; self-flushing); periodic acid flush of drip lines (citric acid); alert on consecutive dripper_fault events per zone as early indicator of scale buildup; schedule sensor cleaning every 3 months

Effect: All site electronics dead; ESP32s offline; valves fail-safe closed (NC); zone offline alert fires after 30 min
Cause: Grid outage; blown MCB/fuse; accidental disconnect; storm damage
Current_Controls: NC solenoids fail safe; zone offline alert after 30 min
Recommended_Action: UPS or battery backup at site; voltage monitoring on ESP32 ADC to detect pre-shutdown

Effect: Excess EC damages plant roots; plants stress or die; no system detection
Cause: Dosing pump failure; manual error; evaporation concentrating tank; fertigation tank runs dry
Current_Controls: None — no EC or water quality monitoring
Recommended_Action: EC sensor on irrigation outlet; visual check before watering events; ML layer anomaly detection on plant stress patterns

Effect: Valve opens; no water reaches roots; dripper_fault fires after repeated failed watering events; plants dry out
Cause: Sediment; fertiliser precipitate; algae; root intrusion; filter bypass
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detects no moisture rise after watering
Recommended_Action: Inline filter per zone feed; periodic flushing protocol; alert on consecutive dripper_fault events for same zone

Effect: pH or chemical contamination damages plants; no system detection; damage seen only after plants affected
Cause: Mains supply event; algae bloom in tank; cross-contamination; pH crash
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: pH and EC sensors on supply line (future hardware); visual inspection of water source

Effect: Valves open normally; no water delivered; plants receive nothing; dripper_fault detects after one full cycle
Cause: Mains interrupted; isolation valve closed; supply pipe failure; pump failure (tank system)
Current_Controls: dripper_fault detects no moisture rise after watering — one cycle delay before detection
Recommended_Action: Flow sensor on main supply per site; alert if watering events fire but moisture consistently fails to rise
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Minor (faster local alert on comms loss; still needs flow sensor for detection)

Effect: Valves open; insufficient flow for proper drip delivery; moisture may rise slowly or not at all
Cause: Multiple zones simultaneously open; supply pressure drop; partially blocked mainline; pump undersized
Current_Controls: dripper_fault may partially detect via low moisture rise vs dripper_baseline; no pressure monitoring
Recommended_Action: Pressure regulator at site; stagger zone watering (no simultaneous open valves); flow sensor; pressure sensor on mainline

Effect: ESP32 overheating causes reboots or sensor drift; enclosure UV degradation; accelerated component wear
Cause: Direct sun on enclosure; Australian summer temperatures; dark enclosure colour; no ventilation
Current_Controls: air_temp monitored but not used to protect electronics; ESP32 WDT restarts on crash
Recommended_Action: UV-rated ventilated enclosure; mount in shade; alert if air_temp > 45C; white or reflective enclosure colour

Failure_Mode: Animal or pest interference (rodents / insects / birds)
Effect: Cables chewed; sensors damaged; shorts or moisture ingress via unsealed enclosure entry points
Cause: Outdoor exposure; unprotected cable runs; unsealed enclosure gland entries
Current_Controls: Downstream effects detected by sensor_ok or dripper_fault after failure occurs
Recommended_Action: Cable conduit or armoured cable; weatherproof gland entries; rodent-proof enclosure; periodic site inspection

Effect: Unstable ESP32 operation; relay chatter; sporadic reboots; intermittent sensor errors; difficult to diagnose remotely
Cause: High local loads; grid instability; undersized supply cabling to site
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: UPS with AVR (automatic voltage regulation); monitor ESP32 reboot frequency as indirect indicator

Effect: Water in exposed lines and valve bodies freezes; pipes burst or valve bodies crack; system inoperable on thaw
Cause: Below 0C ambient; exposed pipework; no freeze protection logic implemented
Current_Controls: air_temp monitored via DHT22 — sub-zero temperatures detectable; no freeze-protection logic exists; Freeze protection implemented in zone_server.ex — alert fires at <=2C; stop command sent; watering suspended until temp rises above 4C
Recommended_Action: Freeze alert when air_temp < 2C; auto-close all valves and suspend watering when frost predicted; insulate exposed pipework
Nerves_Pi_Impact: Significant — freeze protection now implemented in software: alert fires at <=2C; stop command sent to all valves; watering suspended until >4C; Nerves Pi can trigger this independently of central server

Effect: Multiple simultaneous hardware failures across site; entire ESP32 board or power supply destroyed
Cause: Direct or nearby lightning strike; overhead power line induction; no surge protection specified
Current_Controls: None
Recommended_Action: Surge protector on mains input; MOV/TVS diodes on data lines; metal enclosures earthed; equipment insurance
